Class OrderPermission

java.lang.Object
user.OrderPermission
public class OrderPermission extends Object
It implements the permission that allows an employee to manage Orders
See Also:

    • OrderPermission

      public OrderPermission(boolean asc)

      Parameters:
      asc - whether the searcher will search in ascending or descending order

  • Method Details

    • manageOrder

      public void manageOrder(Order order, OrderState status) throws IllegalArgumentException
      It allows an employee to change an order's status
      Parameters:
      order - the desired order
      status - the order's status
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - order was null
